query:
ALTER TABLE projects
  ADD COLUMN programName VARCHAR(255) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN portfolioName VARCHAR(255) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN programId INT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN portfolioId INT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN logoUrl TEXT NULL;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 34DzJoQKEqyc4cp.root --database MtjPfUT7z9e3zhUb3tuetB --execute ALTER TABLE projects
  ADD COLUMN programName VARCHAR(255) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN portfolioName VARCHAR(255) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN programId INT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN portfolioId INT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN logoUrl TEXT NULL;
